title: Leamas Gate Summary v1
description: Wire schema for the supported legacy Leamas Gate Summary v1 format.

schema_version.description: Integer discriminator that identifies the v1 wire format. The lexical form is enforced by the pre-schema envelope scanner.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp emitted by the producer at the moment the summary was generated.

tool.description: Optional producer-identification string naming the tool that emitted the summary.

overall_status.description: Aggregate gate status reported by the producer; separate from the per-check statuses.

checks.description: Ordered list of recorded checks. The original v1 reader does not enforce a collection limit at the wire boundary.

name.description: Stable identifier for the check as emitted by the producer.

status.description: Per-check gate status. Failed, skipped, and unavailable checks are all distinct from passing checks.

duration_ms.description: Optional wall-clock duration in milliseconds. The wire form carries arbitrary-precision integers.

evidence.description: Optional human-readable evidence pointer. The v1 reader applies a soft rendering cap; no wire-level string limit is enforced.
